name: Proterra Inc.
description: Proterra Inc. was an American company that specialized in the design and manufacture of zero-emission electric transit vehicles and advanced electric vehicle technology solutions for commercial applications. The company provided battery-electric transit buses, high-performance battery systems, and charging infrastructure for heavy-duty fleets. By focusing on the electrification of the commercial vehicle sector, Proterra aimed to reduce carbon emissions and improve air quality in urban environments. Although it was a prominent leader in the EV industry, the company eventually filed for bankruptcy and underwent a liquidation process, with its assets acquired by other industry players.
